caption: A person holds a holographic sports trading card featuring basketball player Mike Conley, who wears a white jersey with the number 10. The cards are displayed against a red and black surface featuring the text "JASPYS" and the URL "CASEBREAKS.com". A black box labeled "OBSIDIAN" is visible in the background, along with stacks of packaged cards. Throughout the sequence, the person's hands maneuver the card, tilting it to catch the light and highlight its reflective, iridescent finish. An inset video window shows a man with short dark hair wearing a black shirt, watching the process. The scene progresses as the person holds the card more steadily, eventually revealing the text "MIKE CONLEY" at the bottom of the card. The background elements, including the "JASPYS" logo and "CASEBREAKS.com" text, remain constant across the frames.
